title: Health Transformation Programme Business Case Summary
body: "The Health Transformation Programme (HTP) is modernising health and disability benefit services to deliver better value for money and a better experience for claimants. This business case summary sets out rationale behind developing a new Health Assessment Service and transforming the Personal Independence Payment (PIP) service.  Alternative formats  If you need alternative accessible formats, these can be requested by email:  htp.ministerialandexternalcommunications@DWP.GOV.UK  "
